rows.title: SGLaw200 Youth Forum Underscores Role of Youth in Shaping the Future of the Rule of Law
rows.summary: The Ministry of Law and IPS will host the SGLaw200 Youth Forum on 13 May 2026, commemorating the bicentennial of Singapore's modern legal system.

rows.title: Written Reply by Minister of Law Mr Edwin Tong SC on Assessing Arbitration Clauses
rows.summary: The Ministry of Law is exploring a framework to allow certain low-value freelancer claims to be resolved via the Small Claims Tribunals (SCT), notwithstanding existing arbitration clauses.
